schemes.title: PM-KISAN (Income Support for Farmers)
schemes.summary: ₹6,000/year in 3 installments to eligible farmer families.

summary_i18n.hi: पात्र किसान परिवारों को ₹6,000/वर्ष (3 किस्तों में)।

schemes.eligibilitySummary: Must be a farmer family with cultivable land records; excludes certain higher-income groups.

schemes.title: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Health Coverage)
schemes.summary: Up to ₹5 lakh/family/year for secondary & tertiary care hospitalization.

summary_i18n.hi: परिवार/वर्ष तक ₹5 लाख (अस्पताल में भर्ती उपचार के लिए)।

schemes.eligibilitySummary: Eligibility based on SECC criteria / state health scheme inclusion.

schemes.title: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (Rural Housing)
schemes.summary: Financial assistance for pucca houses for eligible rural households.
schemes.benefits: Assistance amount varies by location; includes toilet support via SBM-G.
schemes.eligibilitySummary: Rural households identified through housing deprivation criteria.

schemes.title: MGNREGA (Rural Employment Guarantee)
schemes.summary: Up to 100 days of wage employment to rural households.
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed wage employment + unemployment allowance in some cases.
schemes.eligibilitySummary: Rural household willing to do unskilled manual work; requires job card.

schemes.title: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Pre/Post Matric
schemes.summary: Central/state scholarship applications through a single portal.
schemes.benefits: Scholarship amount varies by scheme; direct benefit transfer (DBT).
schemes.eligibilitySummary: Depends on scheme: class, category, income ceiling, marks.

deadlines.label: Typical application window
deadlines.note: Varies by scheme/year; check NSP for current deadlines.

schemes.title: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (Zero Balance Account)

title_i18n.hi: प्रधानमंत्री जन धन योजना (जीरो बैलेंस खाता)

schemes.summary: Basic savings bank account for every household, with insurance cover.
schemes.benefits: Bank account + RuPay card + accident insurance (subject to conditions).
schemes.eligibilitySummary: Any resident can open an account with KYC documents.

questions.title: What is your annual household income (approx)?
Which category do you belong to?
questions.helper: Only for eligibility checks; not shared without your consent.

questions.title: Do you have land records (Khasra/Khatauni) available?
questions.helper: Many farmer schemes need land records.
